name: Mocha Marble Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Firm tofu, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 350°F.
2. Blend the honey, water, oil, tahini. Add coffee substitute. Mix in tofu chunks one at a time until creamy.
3. Lightly oil a 9-inch pie pan. Sprinkle with cracker crumbs. Pour half of the tofu mixture into the pan. Drizzle chocolate glaze over it.
4. Cover with the rest of the tofu.
5. Gently insert a knife into the center and pull up to swirl some chocolate through the layers.
6. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
